stemHtml: A Multi-Engine piston (MEP) with inward counter rotating propellers easier to control after an engine failure, when compared to an MEP with clockwise rotating propellers. Why?

options.a: The thrust line is closer to the longitudinal axis.
options.b: The thrust line is further from the longitudinal axis.
options.c: The thrust line is further from the lateral axis.
options.d: The thrust line is closer to the lateral axis.
